model._hint: DreamBooth fine-tune: Envvi/Inkpunk-Diffusion (SD 1.5 base). Loaded as a full checkpoint — no separate LoRA adapter. ~2 GB; no sequential offload needed.

generation._hint: 50 steps gives the cleanest results for DreamBooth fine-tunes. 30 is sufficient for quick previews. | CFG 7–8 per SD 1.5 evaluations. Lower values (5–6) give a looser, more painterly result. | SD 1.5 native 512×512. 640×640 and 768×768 usable but may introduce distortions.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates ink-style illustrations with a punk aesthetic — loose gestural lines, textured surfaces, and a raw expressive quality vaguely inspired by Gorillaz, FLCL, and Yoji Shinkawa.
notes.prompt_guide:
TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: 'nvinkpunk' must appear in every prompt (DreamBooth subject token). Examples: 'nvinkpunk portrait of a warrior', 'nvinkpunk robot in a city at night', 'nvinkpunk woman with flowing hair, detailed ink lines'.

Negative prompt: Suggested: 'deformed, ugly, blurry, bad anatomy, disfigured, poorly drawn face, mutation'.
